titleStmt.title: SII 26.470: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 470. (A.R. No. 447 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kollam 617, Āḍi 7, ba. 12, Thursday, Mṛigasīrsha = 1442 A.D., July 5.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 100 paṇam in aṉṟāḍu vaḻaṅgum Neṉmēni Kaliyugarāmaṉ for certain services and offerings in the temple of the god Mūṉṟīśvaramuḍaiyanāyiṉār of Ambalattāḍinallūr alias Maṇappaḍaivīḍu in the north-eastern quarter of Śrīvallavaṉ-maṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Kīḻkaḻakkūṟṟam, by Māttāṇḍaṉ perumāḷ alias Villavarayar, the temple trustee (dharmakaṟttar). It is stated that the money was received by the Tiruvottamaśāmam Aḻagiyāṉ Śēndīśuvaramuḍaiyāṉ Mūṉṟīśuvara-baṭṭaṉ and Kariyakuḻalaḻagiyāṉ, two of the dēvakaṉmis of the 30 circles of the temple, who had agreed to offer worship and offerings out of the interest from the endowment amount, on every two pradōsha days, on every Aviṭṭam day and on every Svātī day, which was the natal star of the donor, every month, besides using some amount for incenses also.
Besides the two dēvakaṉmis mentioned above, Vaḷattu Vāḻvittār, a tapasvi of the temple and Nāṇambi Ayyaṉ Villavarāya Āśāri, a siṟpi (sculptor) also figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kollam 6 100 10 7 śrī Āṭi mātam 7 10 2 Aparapakṣattu dvādaśiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛgaśīraṣattu nāḷ kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu bramadeyam śrīvallavaṉmaṅkalattu vaṭakiḻ piṭākai Ampalattāṭinallūrāṉa
maṇappaṭai viṭṭil Uṭaiyār muṉṟīcuvaramuṭaiyanāyiṉār koyilil muppatuvaṭṭattil Amarnta tevakaṟmikaḷil tiruvottacāmam Aḻakiyāṉ centicuvaramuṭaiyāṉ muṉṟicuvarapaṭṭaṉum meṟpaṭi kariyakuḻalaḻakiyāṉum Om
Iṉṉāyiṉār koyilil taṉmakaṟtā māttāṇṭaṉ perumāḷāṉa villavarāyaṟku piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṟṟaināḷ Ivar pakkal vāṅkiṉa Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkum neṉmeṉi kaliyukarāmaṉ ø100 Ippaṇam nūṟṟukkum Uḷḷa palicai koṇṭu nāṅ
kaḷ naṭatta kaṟpitta mātam Oṉṟukku pradoṣam Oṉṟukku ney nāḻi Āka pradoṣam Iraṇṭukkum Āṭi Aruḷum neykāppu Irunāḻiyum tiruaviṭṭam Oṉṟukku Āṭi Aruḷum neykāppu Irunāḻiyum Ivar piṟanta nāḷ cotikku Āṭi Aruḷum neykāppu Irunāḻiyum
mātam toṟum nāṅkaḷ naṭatta kaṟpitta tūpattiraviyamum Āka Ivvakaippaṭi mātam Oṉṟukku divatam nālukku Āṭi Aruḷum neykāppu Aṟunāḻiyum tūpattiraviyamum cantirātittavaṟ cellac cantati pravecame śrīmāyeśvarakkaṇ
kāṇippaṭi naṭattip potumpaṭi kaṟpittu piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kalluveṭṭik kuṭuttom māttāṇṭaṉ perumāḷāṉa villavarāyaṟkku Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvottacāmam Aḻakiyāṉ centiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ muṉṟiśvarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kariyakuḻal Aḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyilil tavucikaḷil vaḷattu vāḻvittār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivvūril ciṟpikaḷil nāṇampi Ayyaṉ villavarāya Ācāri Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.470 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
